summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Karen Country Club Golf LMS & CRM Iteration 2 - Mobile optimization and new features tested successfully with 97.2% backend success rate and excellent mobile responsive design

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: VPC consent POST returns 400 when duplicate request exists - this is correct behavior
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Working as designed - prevents duplicate consent requests

ui_bugs.issue: Logout still redirects to auth page instead of landing page
ui_bugs.details: Same issue from iteration 1 - user expects to return to landing page after logout

passed_tests: Mobile landing page optimization at 390px width - no text overlapping, perfect layout
Student login (student@kcc.co.ke / student123) with mobile dashboard stats cards display
Coach login (coach@kcc.co.ke / coach123) with mobile roster card layout working perfectly
Admin login (admin@kcc.co.ke / admin123) with 5-tab dashboard: Overview, Users, Coach Ratings, Bulk Import, Broadcasts
Admin announcement creation via Broadcasts tab New button - working on mobile
Coach attendance tracker with + New Event button and event creation functionality
Coach ClassFeed New Broadcast button and broadcast creation working
Student VPC consent flow available (though duplicate prevention working correctly)
Mobile roster shows card layout properly (md:hidden cards visible, md:block table hidden)
Student scorecard submission complete flow: select course → select tee → enter score → submit → see WHS differential
Scorecard WHS 2024 differential calculation working (score 82 processed correctly)
Mobile sidebar navigation working across all user roles
All 36 backend API tests with 35 passing (97.2% success rate)
Mobile responsive design excellent at 390px width across all components

minor_fixes.issue: Update logout functionality to redirect to landing page instead of auth page (same as iteration 1)
minor_fixes.details: User expects logout to return to landing page, currently goes to auth page
